metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace for spec-driven development.

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Personal spec-driven development workflow: constitution, spec, tech plan, task breakdown, and focused implementation with review gates — plus /spec-cleanup for issue hygiene and /auto autopilot from approved spec to open PR. Specs, plans, and tasks all live in one GitHub issue per feature (tasks as a native checklist) to keep the repo clean. Requires the gh CLI and a GitHub remote.

plugins.name: branch-cleanup
plugins.description: Finds and cleans up stale branches and worktrees left over from feature work — auto-removes what's safely inactive locally, and (opt-in, separately confirmed) prunes matching branches on origin too.
